# 🐺 LXR-RANCH — Ranch Simulation & Management System

**The most comprehensive ranch system for RedM.**

Transform ranching into a multi-layered economic, biological, and managerial gameplay loop with persistent animal simulation, breeding genetics, dynamic economy, and taxation.

## Features

🐄 **6 Animal Species** — Chickens, Turkeys, Cows, Sheep, Goats, Pigs with full lifecycle
🧬 **Genetic Breeding** — Inherited traits across generations with mutation system
📊 **Dynamic Economy** — Supply/demand pricing that responds to server activity
💰 **Taxation System** — Weekly tax cycles with warning → lock → liquidation penalties
🏗️ **5 Ranch Tiers** — Progressive unlocks for species, capacity, and bonuses
❤️ **Condition Scoring** — Animal health directly impacts production and breeding
👥 **Staff Management** — 4-level permission system (Trainee → Boss)
🖥️ **NUI Dashboard** — Beautiful Western-themed ranch management interface
🔧 **Multi-Framework** — LXR Core, RSG Core, VORP Core, Standalone
🛡️ **Anti-Exploit** — Server-side validation, rate limiting, cooldowns
⚡ **Optimized** — LOD simulation for 150+ player servers

## Requirements

- RedM Server
- ox_lib + oxmysql
- LXR-Core / RSG-Core / VORP-Core

## Included

- Full source code (config.lua editable, core files escrow-protected)
- 6 database tables with migration SQL
- Complete documentation
- English + Georgian localization
- NUI dashboard

## Support

- Discord: https://discord.gg/CrKcWdfd3A
